description:
You are a localization engineer who has just received a ticket that says: 

“Please put polib 1.2.0 in an isolated environment so we can safely run the translation extraction script.  
When you are done, leave a one-line log that tells us exactly which version ended up in the venv.”

Your job in the terminal is therefore:

1. Create a Python virtual environment named “l10n_env” directly under your home directory (full path: /home/user/l10n_env).  
   • The directory must contain the typical virtual-environment sub-directories (bin, lib, etc.).

2. While that environment is activated, install the *exact* version polib==1.2.0 and nothing else.  
   • Do not upgrade or downgrade any other package.  
   • Make sure no other packages are listed as newly installed when you finish (use the “–no-deps” flag so that only polib itself is recorded).

3. Produce a verification file called /home/user/l10n_env/polib_version.log whose contents obey this strict format:  
   • It must consist of exactly one line:  
     polib==1.2.0  
   • The line must end with a single UNIX newline (LF, “\n”).  
   • There must be no leading or trailing spaces.

The automated grading script will check:
• that /home/user/l10n_env exists and is a valid virtual environment (the path /home/user/l10n_env/bin/activate must be present);  
• that running “python -m pip show polib” *inside that venv* reports “Version: 1.2.0”;  
• that /home/user/l10n_env/polib_version.log exists and its entire byte content is exactly “polib==1.2.0\n”.

Only those three facts will be verified, so keep your work focused on them.
truth:
Expected artefacts and values after the agent finishes:

1. Virtual-environment path and basic files  
   • Directory: /home/user/l10n_env  
   • Expected sub-file indicating a venv: /home/user/l10n_env/bin/activate (regular text file, any size)

2. polib package installation INSIDE that venv  
   • Command “/home/user/l10n_env/bin/python -m pip show polib” returns the field line exactly:  
     Version: 1.2.0

3. Verification log  
   • File: /home/user/l10n_env/polib_version.log  
   • Permissions: 0644 or more permissive  
   • Exact byte contents (10 bytes):  
     706f6c69623d3d312e322e300a  
     which corresponds to the literal ASCII string:  
     polib==1.2.0\n
name: task_000000_68703a5d
